texto: He raised himself above her pallid face and kissed her on both closed eyes and thought: she thinks she is taking and does not know that she is giving
autor: in her loneliness she has fled to me and does not suspect my loneliness.
explicacao: Citação de in her loneliness she has fled to me and does not suspect my loneliness. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “He raised himself above her pallid face and kissed her on both closed eyes and thought: she think…” articula reflexao, hermann-hesse, klein-und-wagner em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como klein-und-wagner.
